_target: Provide ONE of target_name (a public built-in) or target_sequence (your own).
_binder: Provide ONE of binder_name (a public built-in prompt) or binder_template (your own).
_private_framework: To design with your own antibody framework, set binder_template + binder_cdr_lengths instead of binder_name. Keep this config out of version control (see .gitignore) so the framework stays private.
